calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

R. Michael Lieberman, Esq., for the Granada Enterprise Management, Inc. a limited liability company.
Anthony David Euskis sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Rob Litchfield.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1000 Sutter Street, Room 122, San Francisco, CA 94109.
Damages $735.00
Holdover damages $1435.00
for a Total Judgment of $2,170.00
Counsel for Plaintiff to submit a proposed Judgment within five days.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Granada Enterprise Management LLC is present. Represented by Tony Davidauskis.
Attorney Richard Liberman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Rob Litchfield IS NOT present.
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of MAR-11-2013 remains on calendar.
